title: glaucium elbursium
intro: Glaucium elbursium, also known as Persian poppy or Elburz poppy, is a species of flowering plant in the poppy family (Papaveraceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating pain, inflammation, and respiratory issues, due to its alkaloid content, including glaucine and chelidonine. The health benefits of Glaucium elbursium include its potential to alleviate coughs, colds, and fever, as well as its anti-inflammatory and analgesic properties. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are often dried and used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are believed to provide relief from various health issues.
